message:
fix(runtime): reject post-shutdown tasks and persist decay-dirtied state

Effect queue now drops enqueued tasks received after a shutdown request,
preventing stale work from executing.  Predictive tick strategy marks
itself dirty when decay actually mutates the counter, ensuring decayed
transitions are flushed on shutdown instead of silently lost.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
